Rohit Sharma’s 2027 World Cup Wish Revealed

Dec 5, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Eyelash Wish Sparks Joy for Rohit Sharma

During India’s second ODI against South Africa in Raipur, Rohit Sharma shared a light-hearted moment with Rishabh Pant. Pant noticed a falling eyelash from Rohit and picked it up, prompting the veteran batter to make a wish. Former assistant coach Abhishek Nayar suggested that Rohit’s wish was for lifting the 2027 World Cup, adding a heartwarming and playful touch to the matchday narrative.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Rohit Sharma’s 2027 World Cup Wish Revealed
